rulings.Case Title: MILA POPOV VS. SUNTRUST BANKS, INC. A GEORGIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 11, 2012, line 1. Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction. Continued to June 26, 2012. Defendant to file and serve responsive pleading to Popov declaration filed on May 31, 2012 by 4PM on June 20, 2012. Plaintiff to post another $5,000 by June 15, 2012. TRO to remain in effect. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FV-I INC., FOR THE BENEFIT OF THE MSM LOAN TRUST VS. MIGUEL CORDERO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses Of Deft Miguel Cordero To Pltf'S First Set Request For Production And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 11, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFF FV-I INC., FOR THE BENEFIT OF THE MSM LOAN TRUST's Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses Of Deft Miguel Cordero To Plaintiff's First Set Request For Production And For Monetary Sanctions. Grant motion request for admissions deemed admitted plus $490.00 attorney fees and costs as sanctions. CCP 2023.010, et seq. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE VS. LEILANI VICTORIA RANDOLPH et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 11, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT LEILANI RANDOLPH's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE VS. LEILANI VICTORIA RANDOLPH et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 11, 2012, line 3.DEFENDANT LEILANI RANDOLPH's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Deny. = (501/REQ)
